postData.contentHtml:
Valerie Pawid West, the reigning Miss Global Philippines 2026, has officially relinquished her title, a move confirmed by the ALV Pageant Circle. The organization issued a statement addressing the resignation, citing "contractual and organizational issues" that came to light during an internal compliance review.

The news, which had been the subject of speculation among pageant enthusiasts for weeks, was met with a largely positive sentiment on social media, though some debate also emerged regarding the circumstances of her departure.

With West's resignation, the ALV Pageant Circle is now preparing to announce a new Miss Global Philippines 2026. Pageant fans eagerly await the reveal of the new queen, scheduled for June 20. The organization has not yet disclosed further details about the selection process for West's successor.

This development marks a significant turn in the Miss Global Philippines pageant, and the community will be watching closely to see who will take on the prestigious role.
postData.title: Valerie West Resigns as Miss Global Philippines 2026, New Queen to Be Crowned Soon
postData.summary: Valerie West has officially stepped down as Miss Global Philippines 2026, a decision confirmed by ALV Pageant Circle due to 'contractual and organizational issues.' The search for her successor is now underway, with an announcement expected on June 20.

sources.title: Valerie West resigns as Miss Global Philippines 2026
Valerie West gives up Miss Global Philippines title; new queen known on June 20
ALV Pageant Circle confirms resignation of Valerie West as Miss Global PH 2026
Miss Global Philippines Valerie West resigns
